english: When driving in India, what is the maximum speed limit on highways?
hindi: भारत में हाईवे पर ड्राइविंग करते समय अधिकतम गति सीमा क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் நெடுஞ்சாலையில் வாகனம் ஓட்டும்போது அதிக வேக விதியானது எத்தனை?
vietnamese: Khi lái xe ở Ấn Độ, tốc độ giới hạn tối đa trên cao tốc là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The maximum speed limit on highways in India is 120 kilometers per hour. However, this limit may vary depending on the state and road conditions.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different speed limit or refusing to answer due to lack of information about specific state laws.
